title: [v0.0.1] Backend Scaffolding — FastAPI + DBOS + Agno
description:
Spec: docs/v0.0.1-pre/README.md

Initialize backend project structure following FastAPI idiomatic conventions with DBOS and Agno integration points.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] backend/ directory structure created (app/, api/, core/, db/, agents/, tests/)
- [ ] pyproject.toml with FastAPI, DBOS, Agno, and dev dependencies
- [ ] FastAPI app in app/main.py with middleware, CORS, error handlers
- [ ] Health check endpoint (GET /health) and root metadata endpoint
- [ ] DBOS initialization in app/db/dbos.py with connection pooling
- [ ] SQLAlchemy models in app/db/models.py
- [ ] Alembic migrations infrastructure (empty, ready to use)
- [ ] Environment config in app/core/config.py with .env.example
- [ ] Agno agent registry and example judicial_reasoner.py skeleton
- [ ] All code has type hints; mypy --strict passes
- [ ] Ruff, Bandit, Vulture pass
- [ ] scripts/dev.sh and scripts/presubmit.sh created
- [ ] Backend README.md with setup and development instructions
- [ ] All changes committed and pushed
close_reason: Completed: v0.0.1 scaffolding implemented with all acceptance criteria met and quality checks passing

title: [v0.0.1] Fix missing deps
description: agno and anthropic are imported but not in backend/pyproject.toml. Add them to dependencies.

title: [v0.0.1] Build judge UI in frontend
description: Replace marketing page.tsx with judge interface. Textarea → Judge button → score display (color gradient) + signals + explanation. Add JudgeRequest/JudgeResponse types, update API client.
close_reason: Implemented judge UI: added JudgeRequest/JudgeResponse types to types.ts, added /judge endpoint to constants.ts, added judgeContent() function to api.ts, and replaced page.tsx with the full judge interface (textarea, judge button, score display with color coding, signals list, explanation panel).

title: [v0.0.1] Update CHANGELOG + create v0.0.2-pre
description: Update docs/CHANGELOG.md with v0.0.1 entry. Create docs/v0.0.2-pre/README.md capturing deferred work: virality scoring, distribution analysis, full JudgeOutput, transcript ingestion.
close_reason: Updated docs/CHANGELOG.md with v0.0.1 entry (Added POST /judge, DetectionOutput schema, AI detection prompt, Judge UI, eval fixtures and script; Changed JudgeOutput to DetectionOutput; Removed deferred models). Created docs/v0.0.2-pre/README.md as spec placeholder for full judge output with virality scoring, distribution analysis, and full JudgeOutput.

title: [v0.0.1] Add POST /judge API endpoint
description: New file backend/app/api/judge.py with POST /judge. Request: JudgeRequest(content: str). Response: DetectionOutput (score, signals, explanation). Wire into FastAPI app in main.py.
close_reason: Created backend/app/api/judge.py with POST /judge router. Wired into main.py with app.include_router(judge_router).

title: [v0.0.1] Create Agno evals for AI detection
description: Test fixtures: 5-10 AI samples + 5-10 human samples in tests/fixtures/. Eval script using Agno. AI samples should score < 30, human samples > 70.
close_reason: Created tests/fixtures/ai_samples.json (5 AI samples), tests/fixtures/human_samples.json (5 human samples), and tests/eval_detection.py eval script with thresholds AI<30 and human>70.

title: [v0.0.1] Rewrite spec: AI detection scope
description: Rewrite docs/v0.0.1-pre/README.md scoped to AI detection only. Input: raw text string. Output: { score: 0-100, signals: string[], explanation: string }. 100=human, 0=AI. No virality, distribution, or audience analysis.

title: [v0.0.1] Replace judicial_reasoner with actual judge agent
description:
Replace the incorrect judicial_reasoner.py (generic legal reasoning) with judge_agent.py matching ARCHITECTURE.md:
- Single Agno agent with structured output (JudgeOutput schema)
- Output models: OriginAnalysis, ViralityAnalysis, AudienceSegment
- System prompts as .txt files in prompts/ directory
- Correct Agno API usage (system_message, output_schema)
- Phase-aware prompt loading (text, transcript, video)
close_reason: Replaced with correct judge agent matching ARCHITECTURE.md. All linting passes.

title: [v0.0.1] Simplify agent to AI detection only
description: Rewrite output.py: replace JudgeOutput with DetectionOutput(score, signals, explanation). Rewrite prompts/judge_text.txt: strip virality/distribution, focus on AI detection rubric. Update judge_agent.py: use DetectionOutput, correct Agno API.
close_reason: Rewrote output.py with DetectionOutput, judge_text.txt with AI detection rubric, and judge_agent.py to use DetectionOutput.

title: [v0.0.1] Frontend Scaffolding — React + Next.js + TypeScript
description:
Spec: docs/v0.0.1-pre/README.md

Initialize frontend project structure following Next.js App Router conventions with strict TypeScript and React best practices.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] frontend/ directory with Next.js App Router structure (app/, components/, lib/, public/)
- [ ] package.json with Next.js, React, TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier dependencies
- [ ] tsconfig.json with strict: true
- [ ] ESLint config enforcing react/no-multi-comp (one component per file)
- [ ] Root layout (app/layout.tsx) and home page (app/page.tsx)
- [ ] Example components: Button.tsx, Card.tsx, Header.tsx, Footer.tsx (one per file)
- [ ] Global error boundary and error.tsx / not-found.tsx pages
- [ ] API client in lib/api.ts with fetch/axios wrapper
- [ ] Shared types in lib/types.ts
- [ ] Constants in lib/constants.ts
- [ ] Example custom hook
- [ ] Tailwind CSS or CSS Modules configured
- [ ] All code strictly typed; tsc --strict passes
- [ ] ESLint passes with 0 errors
- [ ] No any types in codebase
- [ ] npm scripts: dev, build, lint, type-check
- [ ] Frontend README.md with setup and component development guide
- [ ] All changes committed and pushed
close_reason: Completed: v0.0.1 scaffolding implemented with all acceptance criteria met and quality checks passing
